hudson.model.FileParameterDefinition.name: visualization.env
hudson.model.FileParameterDefinition.description: Upload a visualization.env file that has been configured and will be used to configure the PIC-SURE Visualization service

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash
set -e # Source folder containing the scripts source_scripts_folder="${JENKINS_HOME}/workspace/Bash_Functions/" ls -la "$source_scripts_folder"
# Iterate through the files in the folder and source them for script_file in "$source_scripts_folder"*.sh; do chmod +x "$script_file" if [ -f "$script_file" ] && [ -x "$script_file" ]; then echo "sourcing $script_file" source "$script_file" fi done
VISUALIZATION_ENV="visualization.env"
# Check if visualization.env exists and is not empty if [[ -f "$VISUALIZATION_ENV" && -s "$VISUALIZATION_ENV" ]]; then echo "Uploading $VISUALIZATION_ENV to S3..." aws s3 --sse=AES256 cp "$VISUALIZATION_ENV" "s3://$stack_s3_bucket/configs/pic-sure-visualization/$VISUALIZATION_ENV" else echo "Warning: $VISUALIZATION_ENV is either empty or does not exist. Skipping upload." fi
